Hero.title: Hey, I'm Lenny.
Hero.text: A 16-year-old passionate about entrepreneurship and technology, and obsessed with personal development. Here, I share my projects and document my journey and reflections.

About.title: About Me
About.text: Since I was little, I have always been fascinated by technology. Entrepreneurship came later, but it quickly became a passion just as big, as it allows me to materialize my ideas and create things that have an impact. But beyond tech and entrepreneurship, I am obsessed with personal development. I base my entire life on continuous improvement.

Contact.title: Contact Me
Contact.text: You have a project in mind or you simply want to exchange with me? I am open to any collaboration or discussion proposal!

faq1.question: How do you balance school and your projects?
faq1.answer: This is a question I get asked often! From my passion for personal development, I derive a fascination for organization. I try to dedicate time to my projects outside of my school hours and academic work, and I make sure to stay organized so I don't get overwhelmed.

faq2.question: Why collaborate with you?
faq2.answer: My young age is my strength: it allows me to bring a fresh and innovative perspective to each project. I am passionate, motivated and I always have the energy to learn and take on new challenges. I am also very responsive.

faq3.question: What tools do you use?
faq3.answer: I use a variety of tools depending on the project I am working on. For web development, I mainly use Next.js and React, and for design, I like to use Framer. For my organization, I like to use Notion. And for communication, I often use emails or Discord.

faq4.question: Can we contact you for something other than code?
faq4.answer: Absolutely! I am open to any exchange around tech, entrepreneurship, personal development or even lighter topics like travel or music. I like meeting new people.

Metadata.title: Projects
Metadata.description: Discover all projects of Lenny TESTU--CHARPENTIER

steps.title: Digital immersion
steps.text: Intensive gaming consumption, sometimes up to 14 hours per day when I didn't go to school. A dependency develops without me realizing it.

steps.title: The awakening
steps.text: The moment of realization. I am not proud of the direction my life is taking. I realize that I am wasting my potential and decide to change radically.

steps.title: The discipline through sports
steps.text: Beginning of weight training. Unable to do a single push-up at the start, I learn the value of repetition. The progress is slow, but real: discipline takes hold. In parallel, I start reading and learning, and I have completely stopped playing video games.

steps.title: The discovery of coding
steps.text: I transition from consumer to creator. I learn HTML, CSS, JavaScript and PHP. I understand that with a computer and curiosity, the possibilities are infinite.

steps.title: The school of failure
steps.text: I start to be interested in entrepreneurship. I begin my first projects, but many fail and remain unfinished. Each mistake becomes a technical and strategic lesson. I forge my rigor.

steps.title: The evolution of the approach
steps.text: I become aware that I haven't really progressed and that I must change my approach. I decide to stop overthinking, and to actually take action.

Now.title: And today?
Now.text: Today, I have developed several projects and I continue to build. I am not the same person I was two years ago. I know that talent is overrated and that only consistency matters. This site is a witness to this evolution: I am still at the beginning of my journey, but I know exactly where I am going.

values.name: Continuous learning
values.description: I believe in the importance of constantly learning and developing to achieve my goals.

values.name: Simplicity
values.description: I like clear and efficient things, and I go straight to the point.

values.name: Honesty
values.description: I believe it is important to be honest and transparent in everything I do, whether it is in my projects or my age.

Contact.title: Contact me
Contact.text: You have a project in mind or you simply want to exchange with me? I am open to any proposal of collaboration or discussion!
